rationale.D1: YAGSL vendored swerve abstraction (JSON configs in deploy/swerve/) confirmed used, but OutakeSubsystem holds SparkMax directly and ArmSubsystem/IntakeSubsystem are empty stubs; no IO interfaces found anywhere.
rationale.D2: LaunchSequence is a SequentialCommandGroup (SpinUp + Launch) and button bindings in RobotContainer confirmed; no Superstructure, no state enums, no FSM coordinator found.
rationale.D3: SwerveSubsystem.simulationPeriodic() is an empty stub and Robot.simulationPeriodic() is empty; VisionSystemSim wiring exists in Vision.java but Vision is never instantiated, so no sim runs at all.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory, no test files, no GitHub Actions workflows found anywhere in the repo.
rationale.D5: SmartDashboard.putNumber confirmed in OutakeSubsystem, SwerveSubsystem, and command classes; no AdvantageKit, DogLog, Epilogue, or URCL found.
rationale.D6: PathPlannerLib vendordep present but zero PathPlanner Java imports in source; only autos are driveForward() (timed) and 'Do Nothing', both wired without trajectory following.
rationale.D7: AimAtTarget and DriveAtTarget use raw PhotonCamera yaw for targeting/servoing confirmed; Vision.java has addVisionMeasurement at line 149 with dynamic std-dev tuning but Vision is never instantiated in RobotContainer or Robot, so pose estimation is dead code.
rationale.D8: Organized Constants.java and consistent package structure confirmed; library folder contains a YAGSL example copy (not a maintained team library); no README beyond WPILib-License.md, no CI.
